ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the agent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the agent */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the agent operates */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the agent is located */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., Broker, Sales Person, Manager) */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales made by the agent */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in real estate */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the agent */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the property is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "price" REAL /* Listing price of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, sold) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo, townhouse) */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sq_footage" REAL /* Square footage of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who facilitated the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction took place */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent from the transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the client */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "preferred_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred agent for the client */,
  "preferred_property_type" TEXT /* Type of property the client is interested in */,
  "min_budget" REAL /* Minimum budget for the client */,
  "max_budget" REAL /* Maximum budget for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the lead */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the lead */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the lead (e.g., contacted, converted) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the lead was created */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the lead (e.g., website, referral, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commissions" (
  "commission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commission rate entry */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent to which the commission applies */,
  "rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the role (in percentage) */,
  "min_threshold" REAL /* Minimum sales threshold for the commission rate */,
  "max_threshold" REAL /* Maximum sales threshold for the commission rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES agents ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales target */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent assigned the target */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the target is set */,
  "monthly_target" REAL /* Monthly sales target for the agent */,
  "annual_target" REAL /* Annual sales target for the agent */,
  "target_status" TEXT /* Status of the target (e.g., achieved, not achieved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_targets_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales reported in the period */,
  "total_commissions" REAL /* Total commissions earned in the period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent associated with the trend */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year for the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the trend */,
  "monthly_sales" REAL /* Total sales recorded for the month */,
  "sales_category" TEXT /* Category of sales (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., lead update, sale completion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client signing the contract */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent signing the contract */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the offer */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being offered on */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "offer_amount" REAL /* Amount of the offer */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client providing feedback */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being feedbacked on */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the client (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
